prime_audit: S69 P2 PRIME-AUDIT / CHECK delta (did NOT rubber-stamp the Triumvirate): (1) Grok-1 fix IMPLEMENTED then the lobby-construction e2e EMPIRICALLY REFUTED it -> reverted (code-proven, not argued); the peerCount=0 no-op is deliberate (per-frame ticker passes real 0; transient WebRTC blips must not flicker the rack). (2) Gemini-C1 fix (joiner assume seat=peerCount) REFUTED -- joiner is not necessarily last + seats are join-order-assigned at Begin, so guessing shows a FALSE you-seat; correct = P3 roster gives the joiner its real seat. (3) Kept only the empirically-sound Grok-2 clamp. The e2e catching the over-eager fix VALIDATES the gotcha (run Playwright on lobby/layout changes -- tsc + 1013 unit tests would have shipped the bug).
triumvirate_check: S69 P2 Full CHECK = Triumvirate (RALPH:PATROL + GROK-ANALYST + GEMINI-AUDITOR, adversarial lenses S154). RALPH PASS (spec-conformance; 7 risk hyp refuted). GEMINI-AUDITOR (correctness/regression) CONDITIONAL (Fidelity 3/Quality 4/Completeness 3): C-1 joiner-isYou -> Gemini fix (seat=peerCount) REFUTED as a false-seat bug; gap is the documented count-based limitation P3 closes. NET VERDICT: SHIP. Grok 2 calls, Gemini 2 calls (~$0.20).

reflexion_entries_to_archive: P1 #drop-orphaned-save #dead-write-removal #blueprint-confirms-no-resume-both-modes #grok-no-fud #skipped-disproportionate-boot-smoke: dropped saveToLocalStorage (the PLAYING->POSTGAME localStorage write, write-only since loadFromLocalStorage was removed S67). KEY MOVE: the owner only ruled on the SINGLE-PLAYER path, but saveToLocalStorage is SHARED code (not mode-gated), so before deleting I checked the LOCKED blueprint for the OTHER mode -- 13.7 specifies "No reconnect / Session ends on disconnect / No host-migration", i.e. multiplayer also has no localStorage-resume. That upgraded the action from "gate it to solo" to "safe to fully remove". Removed fn + only caller + import + now-unused STORAGE_KEY + header trim; KEPT snapshot/restore/netSnapshot/applyNetSnapshot (net + tests + 10.4 replay). A.0 (Rule21) caught that STORAGE_KEY goes unused with the fn AND that restore() is test-called so it stays knip-clean (no false "also delete restore"). e2e grep done manually (e2e is tsc/knip-blind per gotcha) -> zero refs to the removed symbols or the key literal. GATES green: tsc PASS, knip 0, vitest 1000/1000, build 508.93KB (<550, -0.18 vs S68 = dead code left the bundle). GROK-ANALYST SHIP with NO FUD this round -- contrast S66/67/68 where Grok FUD was empirically refuted; the change was too clean to attack. PRIME-AUDIT: SKIPPED the preview boot-smoke as DISPROPORTIONATE (S68 self-drove one, but S68 changed a RENDERED diagnostic string -- this change is not browser-observable; removing a write nothing reads has no visible effect, and the production vite build + full vitest already exercise the same module-resolution + game-loop logic). LESSON: when an owner makes a single-mode product call on SHARED code, read the locked design for the other mode before deleting -- it can turn a narrow gate into a clean full removal. checkpoint 974c248.

P2 #lobby-seat-ux #council-full #seatRack-extract #count-based #e2e-caught-overeager-checkfix: replaced the 1v1 two-pane lobby with a 6-seat fill-the-room rack on the shipped variable-2-6 model (blueprint LOOK, net-free). Council Full adopted: seatRack.ts extraction (A1, keeps the 548-LOC shell from growing), reducer stores peerCount + derives a seats view (A2: the JOINER rack now updates on count change -- pre-S69 it froze after the first peer), getSeatRect 2x3, accessibility glyph empty/solid (A4), static you-glow (A5), FIXED control-button positions (A3) so ALL e2e interaction coords stayed stable -> ZERO e2e spec edits needed (the lobby-construction net passed unmodified). DEFINING LESSON: the Triumvirate CHECK proposed a drop-to-zero fix (Grok-1); I implemented it, but the lobby-construction e2e EMPIRICALLY REFUTED it -- reacting to peerCount=0 broke BOTH the e2e simulatePeerJoin persistence AND real-world transient-WebRTC-blip resilience (the per-frame ticker passes the real 0). Reverted + documented the no-op as deliberate. Kept the Grok-2 count clamp (no self-contradictory "Room 7/6"). Gemini-C1 (joiner isYou) refuted -- guessing seat=peerCount shows a FALSE seat; honest P3 deferral. Gates: tsc, knip 0, vitest 1013, build 511.29KB; boot-smoke 4 modes 0-errors; e2e 6/6. checkpoint e7190b8. RULE: run the e2e on lobby/layout/constant changes -- it caught an over-eager CHECK fix that tsc + all 1013 unit tests would have shipped.
